name: USS YMS-292 (YMS-292)
events: 28 Feb 1945 USS Atule (Cdr. J.H. Maurer, USN) departed Saipan for Midway. She was escorted in by USS YMS 292.
26 Mar 1945 At 1625 K/26, USS Devilfish (T/Lt.Cdr. S.S. Mann, Jr., USN) departed Saipan for Pearl Harbor. She is escorted out until 2200 K/26 by USS YMS 292 (Lt.(jg) W.D. Hughs, Jr.).
